title: Celebrating excellence - Pharmacy at SPAR Grootbrak
description: BUSINESS NEWS - Being recognised as the best...
bodyText:
[{"type":"paragraph","text":"Sponsored Content","html":"Sponsored Content"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"BUSINESS NEWS - Being recognised as the best pharmacy for the second consecutive year is a true honour. This accolade stands as a testament to the dedication, hard work, and commitment of our entire staff, and to the trust our community continues to place in us.","html":"BUSINESS NEWS - Being recognised as the best pharmacy for the second consecutive year is a true honour. This accolade stands as a testament to the dedication, hard work, and commitment of our entire staff, and to the trust our community continues to place in us."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Our consistent pursuit of excellence has allowed us to maintain the highest standards of service and care."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Gratitude to our loyal customers We extend our heartfelt thanks to all our loyal customers - not just for their votes, but for their ongoing recognition of and support for our pharmacy. Your encouragement inspires us every day.","html":"Gratitude to our loyal customers
We extend our heartfelt thanks to all our loyal customers - not just for their votes, but for their ongoing recognition of and support for our pharmacy. Your encouragement inspires us every day."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Team acknowledgements A special thank you goes to the founders, Chris and Gladys Fick, who established the business in 2002. Theo joined the team in 2008 after completing his studies, and his wife Mariana has been part of our staff since 2015.","html":"Team acknowledgements
A special thank you goes to the founders, Chris and Gladys Fick, who established the business in 2002. Theo joined the team in 2008 after completing his studies, and his wife Mariana has been part of our staff since 2015."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The team acknowledges the invaluable contributions and dedication of these individuals, whose efforts have been fundamental to our success.","html":"The team acknowledges the invaluable contributions and dedication of these individuals, whose efforts have been fundamental to our success."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Appreciation from management Management is deeply thankful to the entire team for making these achievements possible. Our promise is to keep striving for excellence and to uphold the reputation we've built together within our community.","html":"Appreciation from management
Management is deeply thankful to the entire team for making these achievements possible. Our promise is to keep striving for excellence and to uphold the reputation we've built together within our community."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Milestones and new beginnings On 4 July 2025, we celebrated a ribbon cutting ceremony as we officially joined the Pharmacy at SPAR group. Later, on 30 July, we proudly opened our second location at shop no 5, SPAR De Dekke Centre.","html":"Milestones and new beginnings
On 4 July 2025, we celebrated a ribbon cutting ceremony as we officially joined the Pharmacy at SPAR group. Later, on 30 July, we proudly opened our second location at shop no 5, SPAR De Dekke Centre."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"We eagerly anticipate continuing to serve and support our growing community.","html":"We eagerly anticipate continuing to serve and support our growing community."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Looking to the future As we step into this new chapter, our vision is to further enhance the level of care and convenience we offer. We are exploring new services, embracing innovative technology, and expanding our team to ensure that every visit exceeds expectations.","html":"Looking to the future
As we step into this new chapter, our vision is to further enhance the level of care and convenience we offer. We are exploring new services, embracing innovative technology, and expanding our team to ensure that every visit exceeds expectations."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Our commitment is not only to maintain the standards that have earned us the community’s trust, but also to adapt and grow alongside the evolving needs of those we serve.","html":"Our commitment is not only to maintain the standards that have earned us the community’s trust, but also to adapt and grow alongside the evolving needs of those we serve."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"We invite our neighbours, friends, and families to join us on this journey. Together, we can build a healthier, more vibrant community - one where compassion, expertise and personal connection remain at the heart of everything we do.","html":"We invite our neighbours, friends, and families to join us on this journey. Together, we can build a healthier, more vibrant community - one where compassion, expertise and personal connection remain at the heart of everything we do."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Thank you for being an integral part of our story thus far; we look forward to many more years of shared success and service.","html":"Thank you for being an integral part of our story thus far; we look forward to many more years of shared success and service."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Same team, same service, same smiles!","html":"Same team, same service, same smiles!"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The Pharmacy at SPAR Grootbrak team are overjoyed with a second consecutive Best of Mossel Bay win.","html":"The Pharmacy at SPAR Grootbrak team are overjoyed with a second consecutive Best of Mossel Bay win."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
